creator: samuel88125@gmail.com
text:
i am a newbie to freebsd. i installed it on my system without partitioning to learn the OS using the handbook.in chapter 4 on installing application. To bootstrap the system using the command /usr/sbin/pkg.what i saw as output is a prebuilt version of pkg could not be found for your system.consider changing package or installing from port.
I tried to install the port using the code cd /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg and then make but got the error message couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this manually into /usr/ports/distfiles and try again.
i have searched and tried so many codes online to fix this problem but could not.i do not understand what the problem could be whether it is my DNS OR server network. i would need some assistance on this. like i said i am a beginner trying to learn the OS.
